subcodes.first_line: We behold the transgressors hastening towards their base desires, while those who are nigh are drawn to the Kawthar of guidance. These, verily, are among the triumphant ones [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: نری المجرمین مهطعین الی الهوی و المقربین الی کوثر الهدی الا انهم من الفائزین
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @chastisement and requital, @praise and encouragement, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
